name: 11p15_Beckwith_Wiedemann_Russell_Silver
description: 11p15.5 imprinted region containing the two imprinted control regions ICR1 (H19/IGF2) and ICR2 (KCNQ1OT1/CDKN1C). Microdeletions, microduplications, and uniparental disomy at this locus cause Beckwith-Wiedemann syndrome (overgrowth, predisposition to embryonal tumors) and the reciprocal Russell-Silver syndrome (growth restriction). Recurrent CNVs are rare but reported; most cases are epimutations or UPD.

architecture.internal_structure: Imprinted gene cluster spanning two ICRs: ICR1 (~2.0 Mb) controls H19/IGF2; ICR2 (~2.7 Mb) controls KCNQ1OT1/CDKN1C/KCNQ1. Modest SD content; breakpoints typically non-recurrent. CDKN1C, IGF2, H19, KCNQ1OT1 are the main dosage/imprinting effectors.
